summary: Completed testing of School Import functionality from Excel/CSV. All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend tests verified import button, modal, template download, file upload validation, and import results display. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.
seed_data_creation: Test file at /tmp/test_import.xlsx used for import testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: School import functionality fully tested. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Missing booking_count in INSERT statement for imported schools, (2) NULL booking_count handling in find_by_institution repository method. All import features working: template download, Excel/CSV parsing, required column validation, email format validation, duplicate detection, update_existing flag.

backend_api.Required column validation: PASS - Rejects files missing 'Název školy' or 'Email'

frontend_ui.Import button state: PASS - Disabled without file, enabled with file

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Schools imported via import endpoint had NULL booking_count, causing Pydantic validation error (expected int, got None)
bugs_fixed.fix: 1. Added booking_count=0 to INSERT statement in /app/backend/routes/schools.py, 2. Added NULL handling in find_by_institution method in /app/backend/database/supabase_repositories.py
